x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Alert-to-incident conversion provides Now Assist TSOM with historical linkage to learn remediation patterns.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.check_script: (function(){var gr=new GlideRecord("em_alert");gr.addNotNullQuery("incident");gr.query();var linked=gr.getRowCount();var gr2=new GlideRecord("em_alert");gr2.query();var total=gr2.getRowCount();var pct=total>0?Math.round((linked/total)*100):0;return{status:pct>=10?"ready":"needs_attention",actualValue:pct+"% of alerts generated incidents ("+linked+"/"+total+")",finding:pct<10?"Only "+pct+"% alert-to-incident conversion. Now Assist TSOM has no historical alert-incident linkage for AI remediation learning.":pct+"% alert-to-incident conversion -- Now Assist TSOM has historical data for AI pattern learning."};})()
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Configure alert management rules to automatically create incidents for actionable alerts.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_4bf81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851cc9
sys_update_version.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[Alert-to-incident conversion provides Now Assist TSOM with historical linkage to learn remediation patterns.]]></ai_justification><check_name>Alert-to-Incident Conversion Rate</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function(){var gr=new GlideRecord("em_alert");gr.addNotNullQuery("incident");gr.query();var linked=gr.getRowCount();var gr2=new GlideRecord("em_alert");gr2.query();var total=gr2.getRowCount();var pct=total>0?Math.round((linked/total)*100):0;return{status:pct>=10?"ready":"needs_attention",actualValue:pct+"% of alerts generated incidents ("+linked+"/"+total+")",finding:pct<10?"Only "+pct+"% alert-to-incident conversion. Now Assist TSOM has no historical alert-incident linkage for AI remediation learning.":pct+"% alert-to-incident conversion -- Now Assist TSOM has historical data for AI pattern learning."};})()]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>AIOPS</module><number>CHK0000450</number><order>80</order><remediation_guidance>Configure alert management rules to automatically create incidents for actionable alerts.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:20</sys_created_on><sys_id>4bf81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851cc9</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Alert-to-Incident Conversion Rate</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_4bf81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851cc9</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:01</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
